name: Ubiquiti Gateway Max
title: Ubiquiti Gateway Max
short_description: The Ubiquiti Gateway Max is a powerful and versatile multi-WAN gateway designed to deliver exceptional network performance for small and medium-sized businesses. It delivers unmatched routing efficiency, advanced security features, and seamless integration with the Ubiquiti UniFi ecosystem, making it an ideal solution for businesses and demanding home users. The Gateway Max is equipped with a powerful quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 processor and 2GB of DDR4 memory, ensuring smooth operation even under demanding network loads.
description: The Ubiquiti Gateway Max is a powerful and versatile multi-WAN gateway designed to deliver exceptional network performance for small and medium-sized businesses. It delivers unmatched routing efficiency, advanced security features, and seamless integration with the Ubiquiti UniFi ecosystem, making it an ideal solution for businesses and demanding home users. The Gateway Max is equipped with a powerful quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 processor and 2GB of DDR4 memory, ensuring smooth operation even under demanding network loads. This hardware configuration allows for efficient routing, security features, and overall network management.

detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Gateway
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Gateway Max is a powerful and versatile multi-WAN gateway designed to deliver exceptional network performance for small and medium-sized businesses. It delivers unmatched routing efficiency, advanced security features, and seamless integration with the Ubiquiti UniFi ecosystem, making it an ideal solution for businesses and demanding home users. The Gateway Max is equipped with a powerful quad-core ARM Cortex-A53 processor and 2GB of DDR4 memory, ensuring smooth operation even under demanding network loads. This hardware configuration allows for efficient routing, security features, and overall network management.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Connectivity and Speed
detailed_description.text: Equipped with four 2.5 GbE LAN ports and a single 2.5 GbE WAN port, the Gateway Max delivers significantly faster data transfer speeds compared to traditional Gigabit Ethernet. The Gateway Max supports multiple WAN connections, allowing you to load balance traffic across different internet service providers (ISPs) for optimal performance. Additionally, it offers failover functionality, automatically switching to a secondary WAN connection in case of an outage on the primary one, ensuring uninterrupted network connectivity for your business. The Gateway Max incorporates a built-in IDS/IPS system that actively monitors network traffic for suspicious activity and potential threats. This advanced security feature helps safeguard your network from malware, phishing attacks, and other cyber threats.

detailed_description.heading: Simplified Management
detailed_description.text: The Gateway Max integrates seamlessly with the Ubiquiti UniFi Network Controller software, allowing for centralized configuration, management, and monitoring of your entire network infrastructure. The gateway features a DC power input option. A USB-C type power adapter is included in the package. The Gateway Max is a perfect foundation for building a scalable network solution for your growing business. Its robust performance and multi-WAN capabilities can easily accommodate expanding network demands.

detailed_description.heading: Compact and Versatile Design
detailed_description.text: Despite its impressive functionality, the Gateway Max maintains a compact form factor, making it suitable for deployment in environments with limited space. This allows for discreet installation on desktops or wall mounting for a clean and professional appearance. The Ubiquiti Gateway Max is an ideal solution for small and medium-sized businesses seeking a high-performance, secure, and versatile network gateway. With its advanced features, robust hardware, and centralized management capabilities, the Gateway Max provides a reliable and scalable foundation for your growing network needs.
